title: Smoky Crumbly Spanish Tofu Stir-Fry
description: A smoky, crumbly tofu stir-fry with parmesan and fresh vegetables, perfect for a low-sodium date night.
instructions: Press the tofu to remove excess moisture, then crumble into bite-sized pieces.
Heat the olive oil in a large wok or skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the crumbled tofu, stirring frequently until it turns golden brown and slightly crisp, about 4-5 minutes.
Add the diced onion and sliced bell pepper; stir-fry for 3 minutes until they begin to soften.
Sprinkle in the smoked paprika and garlic powder, tossing to coat and allowing the spices to toast for 30 seconds.
Add the cherry tomatoes and cook until they just start to burst, about 2 minutes.
Pour in the low-sodium soy sauce and lemon juice, stirring to combine and coat all ingredients.
Reduce heat to medium and add the shredded parmesan, fresh parsley, and red pepper flakes, stirring until the cheese melts and everything is well mixed.
Taste and adjust seasoning if needed; serve hot over a bed of quinoa or cauliflower rice if desired.
Garnish with extra parsley and a sprinkle of parmesan before plating.
